intro.text: I am Kael, the Iron Fist of the Elite Four. Steel and spirit are my weapons. Every punch I throw carries the weight of the mountains. Prepare yourself!

win.text: Your strength is undeniable. Steel bends, but your will did not. Proceed to the next trial.

lose.text: You crumbled like iron without carbon. The forge of the Elite Four is too hot for you - for now.
